mapper.select: SELECT id, config_key, config_value, description, update_time FROM system_config
SELECT id, config_key, config_value, description, update_time FROM system_config WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, config_key, config_value, description, update_time FROM system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_config (config_key, config_value, description) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{description})
